reviews.comment:
Espectacular estación de servicio si venis de Mardel, siendo socio o no del ACA, tiene baños y hermosa arboleda para hacer un alto en el camino. Si pueden paren a probar, yo creo que vale la pena.

(Translated by Google)
This is a spectacular service station if you're coming from Mar del Plata, whether you're an ACA member or not. It has restrooms and a beautiful grove of trees, perfect for a break. If you can, stop and try it out; I think it's worth it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtdnVTNm53RRAB

reviews.comment:
Un lugar cálido

(Translated by Google)
A warm place
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtM3ZPUmxRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Parada obligada para cargar nafta, estirar las piernas en la mitad de camino a la costa, ir al baño (baños limpios) y lo mejor: sentarse a comer bajo los árboles.

(Translated by Google)
A must-stop to refuel, stretch your legs halfway to the coast, use the restroom (clean restrooms) and best of all: sit and eat under the trees.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtcnVYMDZBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buen servicio. Baños limpios. Amplio parque.

(Translated by Google)
Good service. Clean bathrooms. Large parking lot.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtcnFIVm1nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención. Estación ordenada y limpia. Baños en muy buenas condiciones.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. The station is tidy and clean. The restrooms are in very good condition.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtcnVEU1hBEAE
